phren - He remembers so your agent doesn't have to.

Install: npm install -g @alaarab/phren && phren init

Key features:
- Automatic context injection into every prompt via lifecycle hooks
- 60 MCP tools across 11 modules (search, tasks, findings, memory, data, graph, sessions, ops/review, skills, hooks, extraction)
- Finding lifecycle tooling (`supersede_finding`, `retract_finding`, `resolve_contradiction`, `get_contradictions`) with provenance and impact scoring
- Session continuity via cross-session task checkpoints + `session_history`
- Skill system with source precedence, alias-collision handling, visibility gating, and generated `skill-manifest.json`
- Memory governance with confidence decay, trust filtering, and quality feedback
- Governance identity and RBAC via `PHREN_ACTOR`, `access-control.local.json`, and role policies
- Web UI security by default: loopback-only, auth token, CSRF, CSP
- Telemetry is opt-in and local-only (`.runtime/telemetry.json`)
- Interactive terminal shell with eight views (Projects, Tasks, Findings, Review Queue, Skills, Hooks, Machines/Profiles, Health)
- Multi-agent support: Claude Code, Copilot CLI, Cursor, OpenAI Codex

Docs: https://alaarab.github.io/phren/
Full LLM reference: https://alaarab.github.io/phren/llms-full.txt
npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@alaarab/phren
